title: gh#62: R2.2 â€” Add planDelete; switch api/post.service.deletePost
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/62.
Backlog section: Candidate 2 â€” Post Lifecycle aggregate.

## Context

Second PR in Candidate 2. Migrates `deletePost` to the aggregate.

## Scope

- Add `planDelete(currentRow: PostState): void` to `packages/shared/src/post/aggregate.ts`
  - Throws `PostInvariantError({ kind: 'not_deletable' })` if status is not in `DELETABLE_STATES`
  - Returns `void` (no patch â€” deletion is a row removal, handled by the repo)
- Update `packages/api/src/services/post.service.ts` â†’ `deletePost`:
  - Call `planDelete(loadedRow)` inside the transaction before the actual DELETE
  - Soft-delete of media still happens in the service (out of aggregate scope per ADR-0003)
- Unit tests for `planDelete`: each `DELETABLE_STATES` value passes; each non-deletable state throws with correct `kind`

## Out of scope

- `planTransitionToPublishing` (R2.3)
- `planRecordSuccess` / `planRecordFailure` (R2.4)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` and test pass
- `pnpm --filter @sms/api build` and test pass
- Existing `deletePost` tests pass

## References

- ADRs: [0003](../blob/main/docs/adr/0003-post-lifecycle-is-pure-functions-not-shared-repository.md), [0004](../blob/main/docs/adr/0004-publish-cycle-orchestration-stays-in-the-worker.md)
- Depends on: #61
